description: In this episode, Jacob, CEO of Zora, discusses the evolution of their platform from NFTs to creator coins, emphasizing the importance of bringing creators into the crypto space. He highlights the challenges and opportunities in the creator economy and the potential for crypto to redefine value distribution among creators and their supporters.
topic_summary: Jacob from Zora explains their transition from NFTs to creator coins, the challenges of attracting creators to crypto, and the potential for a new value exchange model in social media [t=77:18].
